title: Membership Changes Coming in October 2018
excerpt: With a new Squash Season starting up, we’re excited to announce a new membership structure. This is the result of consultation with our membership and research into other clubs. content:
With a new Squash Season starting up, we’re excited to announce a new membership structure. This is the result of consultation with our membership and research into other clubs.

As of October 1st 2018 the new membership structures will be as follows:

      1. PREMIUM MEMBERSHIP – $89 per month (reduced from $99):
        1. Members will be able to book up to 2 WEEKS in advance
        2. Members will be able to have 3 ACTIVE PRIME-TIME BOOKINGS at a time and UNLIMITED NON-PRIME-TIME BOOKINGS (one per day)
        3. Ball Machine Access
        4. Only premium members are eligible to play ESL (Interclub)
        5. Unlimited Drop-in Program Access
        6. $35/month ESL fee will be dropped and replaced with a TEAM FEE (Read more about that here)
      2. BASIC MEMBERSHIP – $49/month (unchanged):
        1. Members can book 1 WEEK in advance
        2. Members have 4 court bookings/uses per month (PRIME TIME and NON-PRIME TIME)
        3. Unlimited Drop-in Program Access

        **NOTE: This category of membership will no longer be available after October 1st 2018. However current Basic Members are welcome to continue with this arrangement indefinitely.

      3. NON-PRIME TIME MEMBERSHIP – $49/month (NEW)
        1. Members can book 1 WEEK in advance
        2. Members will be able to have unlimited bookings in NON-PRIME TIME (one per day)
        3. PRIME-TIME bookings will be charged a Drop-in fee of $20
        4. Unlimited Drop-in Program Access

      ***PRIME TIME  is 4:30 PM – 9:00 PM Weekdays
      10:30 AM – 1:30 PM Weekends during Interclub Season

      All members enjoy:

      • Fob Access from 5 AM – midnight 365 days a year
      • Sweat and Shower Towels
      • Steam Room Access
      • Unlimited Fitness Access
      • All Drop-ins
      • Unlimited PlaySight Access
      • Discounts on Programs and Pro-Shop
      • Children of all members receive a complimentary Non-Prime Time membership

ESC Fun Facts:

  • We are a not-for-profit organization
  • We have been operating for 3 years
  • We currently have 292 members. That’s a 21 % increase over last year
  • We have 215  male members, 44  female members and 33  junior members
  • We rely on volunteers to support tournaments and do court maintenance
  • The cost of towels are 3% of our budget
  • Rent & utilities consume 29% of our budget
  • Salaries are 28% of our budget
  • Our membership fees contribute 57% of our annual revenue
  • Beer (and other food and drink) proceeds are 8 % of our annual revenue
  • We are supported by key sponsors for tournaments, TVs, furniture, trophies, plaques, pro
    lessons, etc to help support our community, our club, and reduce expenses.
  • The club provides funding and services to grow our junior and women’s programs
  • We have a  64% of singles court time free between 9 am and 4 pm
  • The doubles court is unbooked 92%(!) of the time. We will be working hard on this stat
  • We are very close to becoming cash flow positive and expect to achieve that during the 2018/19 year
